title: PHP Variable Functions and Anonymous Functions
codeExample:
<?php
// Variable function
function sayHello() { echo "Hi!"; }
function sayBye() { echo "Bye!"; }

$action = "sayHello";
$action(); // Hi!

// Array of callables
$operations = [
    'double' => fn($n) => $n * 2,
    'triple' => fn($n) => $n * 3
];
echo $operations['double'](5); // 10

// Closure as callback
$numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4];
$squared = array_map(fn($n) => $n ** 2, $numbers);
print_r($squared);
?>
